//: TEAMMATE DEVCONTAINER for generating Mendix handover docs with the doc-generator plugin.
// how: Copy this folder as `.devcontainer/` into ANY Mendix project (the repo containing the .mpr), set MARKETPLACE_URL below, then 'Reopen in Container'. The plugin auto-installs; mxcli is fetched per-platform on first use.
name: mendix-doc-generator
// MARKETPLACE_URL: Replace with the git URL you pushed mendix-doc-generator/ to (e.g. https://dev.azure.com/blackbelt/_git/mendix-doc-generator). A local path also works if the marketplace folder is mounted.
postCreateCommand: curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash && export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && claude plugin marketplace add "$MARKETPLACE_URL" && claude plugin install doc-generator@blackbelt && echo '✅ doc-generator installed — open a Claude session and run /doc-generator:generate-doc'
